basic_details.job_title: Sainik School Ghorakhal Teaching and Non Teaching Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline for 10 PGT, TGT, Nursing Assistant and More Posts
basic_details.short_information: Sainik School Ghorakhal, Nainital, under the Sainik Schools Society, Ministry of Defence, Government of India, has released an official advertisement for various Teaching and Non-Teaching positions.

important_dates.last_date_to_apply: Within 21 days from the date of publication in Employment News
important_dates.written/practical test & selection: Only shortlisted candidates will be intimated separately

age_limit.details: PGT (Mathematics): 21–40 years. TGT (Hindi / Mathematics / English / Science): 21–35 years. | Nursing Assistant: 21–50 years. PTI/PEM-cum Matron (Female): 18–50 years. Band Master: Not specified. Medical Officer: Not more than 50 years.

qualification.details: Candidates must fulfill the minimum qualifications specified for each post: | PGT (Mathematics): Two-year Integrated PG M.Sc. Course of Regional College of Education of NCERT or recognized university/institute in Mathematics/Applied Mathematics with at least 50% marks, OR Master's Degree with 50% marks in Mathematics. B.Ed from a recognized university. Proficiency in teaching in English medium. Age: 21–40 years. TGT (Hindi / Mathematics / English / Science): Four-year integrated degree course of Regional College of Education of NCERT or other NCTE recognized institution with at least 50% marks in the relevant subject, OR Bachelor's Degree with at least 50% marks in the relevant subject (studied in all three years). B.Ed from a recognized university. Pass in CTET Paper II by CBSE. Proficiency in teaching in English and Hindi medium. Age: 21–35 years. | Nursing Assistant: Nursing Diploma/Degree with minimum 5 years of experience, or ex-serviceman of Medical Assistant trade with at least 5 years of service after training. Age: 21–50 years. PTI/PEM-cum Matron (Female): Bachelor's Degree in Physical Education (B.P.Ed.) or equivalent. Age: 18–50 years. Band Master: Potential Band Master/Band Major/Drum Major course at AEC Training College and Centre, Pachmarhi or equivalent Naval/Air Force Courses. Age: Not specified. Medical Officer: MBBS degree. Candidate must reside on school campus and attend to medical emergencies at all hours. Age: Not more than 50 years. | Teaching experience in a Public School. Higher qualifications and CTET qualification (for PGT). Proficiency in Games/Sports and other extra co-curricular activities. Knowledge of Computer Application.

salary_details.details: Essential administrative details regarding the vacancy package include:

how_to_apply: Eligible candidates must submit offline applications in the following manner:
Prepare a complete Bio-Data along with one recent passport-size photograph.
Attach self-attested photocopies of all mark sheets, certificates, caste certificate, and testimonials.
Download the application form from the school website: www.ssghorakhal.org and fill it completely in all respects. Incomplete applications will be rejected.
Mention the name of the post on the top of the envelope in capital letters.
Send the application by post to:
The Principal, Sainik School Ghorakhal, PO- Ghorakhal, Distt- Nainital (Uttarakhand) PIN – 263156

Applications must reach the Principal within 21 days from the date of publication of the advertisement in Employment News. Hand-delivered and late applications will not be accepted. The school will not be responsible for postal delays.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for Sainik School Ghorakhal Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The last date is within 21 days from the publication of the advertisement in Employment News. Candidates should apply early to avoid postal delays.

faq.question: Q2. How can I apply for Sainik School Ghorakhal vacancies?
faq.answer: Applications must be submitted offline by post. Candidates need to download the form from the official website, fill it, attach documents, and send it to the Principal, Sainik School Ghorakhal.

faq.question: Q3. Is there an online application option available?
faq.answer: No, only offline applications sent via post are accepted. Hand-delivered applications are not allowed.

faq.question: Q4. What is the selection process for these posts?
faq.answer: The selection involves application screening followed by a written/practical test and interview for shortlisted candidates.

faq.question: Q5. Are TA/DA provided for attending the selection process?
faq.answer: No, candidates will not receive any TA/DA for appearing in the test or interview.

faq.question: Q6. What are the salary benefits for teaching posts?
faq.answer: Teaching posts offer Pay Level 07 or 08 with allowances, along with rent-free accommodation and free meals with cadets.

faq.question: Q7. Is CTET mandatory for all teaching posts?
faq.answer: CTET Paper II is mandatory for TGT posts. For PGT, CTET is desirable but not compulsory.

faq.question: Q8. What is the age limit for teaching positions?
faq.answer: PGT candidates must be between 21–40 years, while TGT candidates should be between 21–35 years.

faq.question: Q9. Can candidates from other states apply?
faq.answer: Yes, candidates from across India can apply if they meet the eligibility criteria.

faq.question: Q10. Where will the selection process take place?
faq.answer: All tests and interviews will be conducted at Sainik School Ghorakhal, Nainital (Uttarakhand).
